0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","h1",null,{"children":"Migration"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Upgrade Mnemosyne versions and migrate data between instances."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Version Upgrade"}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"Check Current Version"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"python -c \"import mnemosyne; print(mnemosyne.__version__)\"\n","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"Upgrade Steps"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"# 1. Backup current database\ncp mnemosyne.db mnemosyne-pre-upgrade.db\n\n# 2. Upgrade package\npip install --upgrade mnemosyne\n\n# 3. Run migrations\npython -m mnemosyne.migrate --db mnemosyne.db\n\n# 4. Verify\npython -c \"from mnemosyne import Memory; m = Memory(); print(m.stats())\"\n","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Schema Migrations"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne uses automatic schema migrations:"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["| Version | Migration | Description |\n|---------|-----------|-------------|\n| 1.0 → 2.0 | ",["$","code",null,{"children":"m_1_0_to_2_0"}]," | Add semantic memory, FTS5 indices |\n| 2.0 → 2.1 | ",["$","code",null,{"children":"m_2_0_to_2_1"}]," | Add session_id to episodic |\n| 2.1 → 2.2 | ",["$","code",null,{"children":"m_2_1_to_2_2"}]," | Add temporal graph indexes |"]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Migrations run automatically on first connection. No manual intervention needed."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Cross-Instance Migration"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Export from old instance, import to new:"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"# Export\npython -m mnemosyne.export --db old.db --format json --output export.json\n\n# Import\npython -m mnemosyne.import --db new.db --format json --input export.json\n","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"Export Formats"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"| Format | Use Case | Size |\n|--------|----------|------|\n| JSON | Human-readable, version control | Large |\n| SQLite | Fast, preserves all metadata | Compact |\n| CSV | Spreadsheet analysis | Medium |"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Rollback"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"If upgrade fails:"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"# Stop application\n# Restore pre-upgrade backup\ncp mnemosyne-pre-upgrade.db mnemosyne.db\n\n# Downgrade package\npip install mnemosyne==1.0.0\n\n# Restart\n","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-warning","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L3",null,{"iconNode":[["path",{"d":"m21.73 18-8-14a2 2 0 0 0-3.48 0l-8 14A2 2 0 0 0 4 21h16a2 2 0 0 0 1.73-3","key":"wmoenq"}],["path",{"d":"M12 9v4","key":"juzpu7"}],["path",{"d":"M12 17h.01","key":"p32p05"}]],"className":"lucide-triangle-alert shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Breaking Changes"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"Major version upgrades (1.x → 2.x) may include breaking changes. Always read the changelog and test in staging before production deployment."}]}]]}]]}]}]],[["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/06qv3~~e._cb6.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-1",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0nuipubmwenwa.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-2",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0fekzj03ltn5y.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-3",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0pqew2nbfoy2f.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-4",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/07.05twov8012.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-5",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/113wy2s~ukj5p.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-6",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0se1rt9lzyib_.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-7",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0e1gsufr5shdc.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-8",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/13n60-fppanm4.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-9",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0g~f0923b0wjv.js","async":true}]],["$","$L4",null,{"children":["$","$5",null,{"name":"Next.MetadataOutlet","children":"$@6"}]}]]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"oLBkLcipfllBBS_uEwuBd"}
